title: Verify existing implementation of debounce utility
description: The debounce utility was already implemented in src/utils/timing-helpers.ts with comprehensive tests in timing-helpers.test.ts. The implementation uses fake timers for testing, covers delay execution, multiple calls within delay (only executes once), last arguments used, multiple arguments, re-execution after delay, and this context preservation.
existing_patterns: src/utils/ - Single-function utility files with co-located .test.ts files
src/utils/timing-helpers.ts:13-86 - Uses vitest fake timers pattern (vi.useFakeTimers, vi.advanceTimersByTime)
